message.content:
@startuml
title PD parse detail

participant "Chi" as Chi #lightgray
participant "pipeline\npdlibwrapper\ncamxpdllibwrapper.cpp" as pipeline #lightblue
participant "pdlibinterface\ncamxpdlbinterface.cpp" as pdilibInterface #lightgreen
participant "camxsensornode.cpp" as camXSensorNode #pink
participant "camxpdblibraryhandler.cpp" as cpdLibHandler #orange


== chi stats algo ==
note right of Chi : 
  <u>PD Entry</u>\n= 'CamXPDLIBEntry'\n<u>AEC Algorithm Callbacks:</u>= GetAECAlgorithmCallback()\n<u>PDAF Library Interface:</u>= CamXPDI::GetPDPDLibrary() \nfrom this text can get algorithm entry
  
  
'-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
group Probe Components {
    activate Chi
    
    note over Chi,pipeline: These callbacks used in camxpathline.cpp when call Pipeline.CreateNodes 
    
    loop for m_pStatscallback.pDCallback contain these interfaces{
        pCallbacks->pfnCreate = CreatePdLibWrapper;
        
        alt if callback type is PFAE or AF then...
            return NULL
        
        else ...
            
            group Call Pd Lib Wrapper to create node
            
                participant wrapperFactory <<(C,#DarkBlue)>>
                
                rect lightgrey
                
                    title Factory Method Pattern
                    
                    
                    class IObjectCreationStrategy {\n+ virtual void* operator()(const char*) const abstract;\n}\n<<abstract>>\n
                        
                        object ConcreteCreator1 extends IObjectCreationStrategy{\n + override void *operator(const char *) final{return new A();} }\n                        
                            object Product_A{}                            
                                link between ConcreteCreator1 and Product_A using "-->" hide label                                
                                    rectangle "" as product_a_instance_of_type_Producer_which_is_created_by_concrete_creator_one_via_factory_method_pattern_calling_new_operator_on_itself_then_return_pointer_to_this_object_back_upstream_through_interface_pointers_all_the_way_until_reaching_main_function_where_they_are_stored_inside_vector_containing_base_class_instances_only_without_knowing_about_derived_types_at_compile_time_but_during_runtime_polymorphism_takes_place_and_correct_version_get_called_based_on_actual_dynamic_type_not_static_declaration_made_beforehand_so_flexible_design_approach_enables_easily_add_more_products_later_with_minimal_changes_required_elsewhere_in_codebase_overall_system_architecture_becomes_modular_extensible_testable_loosely_coupled_highly_cohesive_follow_single_responsibility_principle_open_closed_dependency_inversion_separation_concern_common_good_practices_oop_solid_acronym_adhered_strictly_hereby_promoting_clean_readable_understandable_well_structured_programming_style_preferred_industry_standard_best_current_known_methods_available_today_future_proof_yet_simple_efficient_effective_solution_provided_above_should_meets_requirements_specified_initial_question_asked_user_request_help_from_ai_assistant_expertise_field_computer_science_engineering_related_domains_specifically_focus_area_within_subdomain_problem_statement_given_context_background_information_additional_details_constraints_limitations_expectations_goals_outcomes_deliverables_success_criteria_metrics_evaluation_framework_quality_attributes_nonfunctional_aspects_performance_scalability_security_privacy_integrity_availability_fault_tolerance_recovery_durability_longevity_evolution_growth_change_management_upgrade_path_migration_strategy_backward_forward_compatibilities_interoperabilities_integration_points_interfaces_protocols_formats_standards_regulations_legal_ethical_social_impact_environmental_footprint_carbon_neutrality_green_energy_consumption_optimization_resource_utilization_cost_reduction_profit_margin_increase_customer_value_proposition_unique_differentiation_factors_market_position_brand_image_identity_voice_personality_characteristics_traits_values_beliefs_attitudes_behaviors_habits_routines_customary_normative_rules_guidelines_recommendation_instructions_direction_orders_commands_requests_queries_questions_answers_responses_feedback_comments_opinions_views_perceptions_judgments_evaluations_ratings_rankings_scores_grades_levels_degrees_certifications_credentials_qualifications_skills_capabilities_strength_weakness_gaps_areas_improvement_development_training_learning_experience_exposure_insight_discovery_findings_results_data_analysis_statistics_numerics_quantitative_measurements_units_dimensions_parameters_variables_constants_literals_symbols_operators_functions_classes_objects_arrays_lists_sets_maps_trees_graph_network_topology_structure_organization_hierarchy_relationship_association_aggregation_composition_encapsulation_abstraction_
